a.xlink:title: Base interface for all computational operations in the processing pipeline.
Template-flexible analyzer base with instance-defined I/O types.
Template-flexible extractor base with instance-defined I/O types.
Template-flexible sorter base with instance-defined I/O types.
Template-flexible transformer base with instance-defined I/O types.
High-performance energy analyzer with zero-copy processing.
Concrete UniversalAnalyzer that dispatches entirely via a GpuExecutionContext.
Computes a scalar attribute per grain and writes it onto each Region.
High-performance statistical analyzer with zero-copy processing.
Concrete UniversalExtractor that dispatches entirely via a GpuExecutionContext.
Segments container audio into fixed hop-size grain windows.
Concrete UniversalSorter that dispatches entirely via a GpuExecutionContext.
Concrete implementation for standard comparison-based sorting.
Sorts grains by a named attribute key, with optional GPU dispatch.
Concrete UniversalTransformer that dispatches entirely via a GpuExecutionContext.
